'''âk-y-f''' ('''kayafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:esloin|esloin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:esloin|esloin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-y-f
|-
! Lemma
| kayafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kayafithi|kayafithi]] || [[word:kayafiji|kayafiji]] || [[word:kayafishi|kayafishi]] || [[word:kayafi|kayafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayafuthuth|kayafuthuth]] || [[word:kayafujuj|kayafujuj]] || [[word:kayafushush|kayafushush]] || [[word:kayaf|kayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayafuthu|kayafuthu]] || [[word:kayafuju|kayafuju]] || [[word:kayafushu|kayafushu]] || [[word:kayafu|kayafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayafufuth|kayafufuth]] || [[word:kayafufuj|kayafufuj]] || [[word:kayafufush|kayafufush]] || [[word:kayafuf|kayafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kayafethe|kayafethe]] || [[word:kayafeje|kayafeje]] || [[word:kayafeshe|kayafeshe]] || [[word:kayafe|kayafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayafothoth|kayafothoth]] || [[word:kayafojoj|kayafojoj]] || [[word:kayafoshosh|kayafoshosh]] || [[word:kayaf|kayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayafotho|kayafotho]] || [[word:kayafojo|kayafojo]] || [[word:kayafosho|kayafosho]] || [[word:kayafo|kayafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayafofoth|kayafofoth]] || [[word:kayafofoj|kayafofoj]] || [[word:kayafofosh|kayafofosh]] || [[word:kayafof|kayafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kayafĂŠthĂŠ|kayafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kayafĂŠjĂŠ|kayafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kayafĂŠshĂŠ|kayafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kayafĂŠ|kayafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayafathath|kayafathath]] || [[word:kayafajaj|kayafajaj]] || [[word:kayafashash|kayafashash]] || [[word:kayaf|kayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayafatha|kayafatha]] || [[word:kayafaja|kayafaja]] || [[word:kayafasha|kayafasha]] || [[word:kayafa|kayafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayafafath|kayafafath]] || [[word:kayafafaj|kayafafaj]] || [[word:kayafafash|kayafafash]] || [[word:kayafaf|kayafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kayafasha|kayafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokayafasha|gokayafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikayafasha|gokikayafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kayafnĂŒsha|kayafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokayafnknĂŒsha|gokayafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikayafnĂŒsha|gokikayafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kayafshĂ«sha|kayafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokayafnkshĂ«sha|gokayafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikayafshĂ«sha|gokikayafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kayafrosha|kayafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokayafnkrosha|gokayafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikayafrosha|gokikayafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kayafmusha|kayafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokayafnkmusha|gokayafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikayafmusha|gokikayafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kayafsherasha|kayafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokayafnksherasha|gokayafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikayafsherasha|gokikayafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kayafngasha|kayafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokayafnkngasha|gokayafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikayafngasha|gokikayafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kayafyasha|kayafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokayafnkyasha|gokayafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikayafyasha|gokikayafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kayafyamasha|kayafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokayafnkyamasha|gokayafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikayafyamasha|gokikayafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kayafnĂŒshĂ«sha|kayafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokayafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokayafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikayafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikayafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kayafnĂŒrosha|kayafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokayafnknĂŒrosha|gokayafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikayafnĂŒrosha|gokikayafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kayafnĂŒmusha|kayafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokayafnknĂŒmusha|gokayafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikayafnĂŒmusha|gokikayafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kayafshĂ«nĂŒsha|kayafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokayafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokayafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikayafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikayafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kayafshĂ«rosha|kayafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokayafnkshĂ«rosha|gokayafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikayafshĂ«rosha|gokikayafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kayafshĂ«musha|kayafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokayafnkshĂ«musha|gokayafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikayafshĂ«musha|gokikayafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kayafronĂŒsha|kayafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokayafnkronĂŒsha|gokayafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikayafronĂŒsha|gokikayafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kayafroshĂ«sha|kayafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokayafnkroshĂ«sha|gokayafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikayafroshĂ«sha|gokikayafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kayafromusha|kayafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokayafnkromusha|gokayafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikayafromusha|gokikayafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kayafmunĂŒsha|kayafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokayafnkmunĂŒsha|gokayafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikayafmunĂŒsha|gokikayafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kayafmushĂ«sha|kayafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokayafnkmushĂ«sha|gokayafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikayafmushĂ«sha|gokikayafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kayafmurosha|kayafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokayafnkmurosha|gokayafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikayafmurosha|gokikayafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kayaf|kayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠyĂŠf|kĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokayaf|hokayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠyĂŠf|hokĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokayaf|hohokayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠyĂŠf|hohokĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkayaf|nĂŒkayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠyĂŠf|nĂŒkĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkayaf|nĂŒnĂŒkayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠyĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkayaf|nĂŻkayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠyĂŠf|nĂŻkĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkayaf|nĂŻnĂŻkayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠyĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukayaf|lukayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠyĂŠf|lukĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukayaf|lulukayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠyĂŠf|lulukĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likayaf|likayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠyĂŠf|likĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikayaf|lilikayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠyĂŠf|lilikĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokayaf|kokayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠyĂŠf|kokĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokayaf|kokokayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠyĂŠf|kokokĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekayaf|kekayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠyĂŠf|kekĂŠyĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekayaf|kekekayaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠyĂŠf|kekekĂŠyĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
